deductible.notes: Preventive care is covered before deductible is met. Most copay-based services (office visits, Rx) also apply before deductible.

out_of_pocket_max.notes: Once met, covered services are paid at 100% for the rest of the plan year.

coinsurance.in_network: 80% after deductible for services without a set copay

primary_care.notes: Applies to in-network PCP visits. Copay applies before deductible.

specialist.notes: Applies to in-network specialist visits. No referral required.

urgent_care.notes: For non-emergency, same-day care at urgent care centers.

emergency_room.notes: Waived if admitted to the hospital. ER copay applies even out-of-network.

physical_therapy.notes: Covered up to 30 visits per year. No prior auth required.

occupational_therapy.notes: Covered up to 30 visits per year.

speech_therapy.notes: Covered up to 20 visits per year.

mental_health_therapy.notes: Applies to outpatient therapy sessions (psychologist, LCSW, LPC, etc.).

mental_health_psychiatry.notes: Applies to outpatient psychiatry visits including medication management.

telehealth.notes: For virtual primary care and mental health visits via in-network telehealth providers.

preventive_care.notes: Covered at $0 before deductible per ACA guidelines. Includes annual physicals, recommended screenings, and immunizations.

lab_work.notes: For routine lab work ordered by an in-network provider. Complex labs may apply coinsurance instead.

imaging_xray.notes: Standard X-rays. MRI and CT scans require prior authorization and apply coinsurance after deductible.

chiropractic.notes: Covered up to 20 visits per year. No referral required.

nutrition_counseling.notes: Up to 6 visits per year with a registered dietitian.

vision_exam.notes: One routine eye exam per year covered. Frames and lenses are not covered under the medical plan.

tier_1_generic.supply: 30-day supply at retail; 90-day supply by mail for $25

tier_2_preferred_brand.supply: 30-day supply at retail; 90-day supply by mail for $90

tier_3_non_preferred.supply: 30-day supply. Mail order available for $150 for 90-day supply.

tier_4_specialty.notes: Prior authorization required. Specialty pharmacy program enrollment may be required.

birth_control.notes: Generic and certain brand contraceptives covered at $0 under ACA preventive mandate. Includes pills, patches, rings, IUDs, and implants.

fertility_treatment.notes: Covered with prior authorization. Lifetime maximum benefit of $15,000.

maternity.notes: Prenatal visits at $0 copay. Labor and delivery: $250 facility copay after deductible.

vision_exam.notes: One routine exam per year. Glasses and contacts not covered under medical plan.

weight_loss_surgery.notes: Prior authorization required. Must meet BMI and documented medical necessity criteria.

durable_medical_equipment.notes: Covered at 80% after deductible for medically necessary DME (e.g., CPAP, wheelchair). Prior auth may be required.

home_health_care.notes: Up to 60 visits per year with prior authorization.

skilled_nursing_facility.notes: Up to 60 days per year after a qualifying hospital stay. Prior authorization required.

ambulance.notes: Covered at 80% after deductible for medically necessary transport.

network.notes: You can see any provider without a referral. Out-of-network providers are covered at a lower rate. Always verify a provider is in-network before your visit to minimize costs.

hospital.inpatient_notes: Per admission copay, then 80% coinsurance after deductible. Prior authorization required for non-emergency admissions.
hospital.outpatient_surgery_notes: Per procedure. Some procedures may require prior authorization.
